title: solanum nigrum var. pilcomayense
intro: Solanum nigrum var. pilcomayense is a variety of the black nightshade plant, a species of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family, also known as the deadly nightshade family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Solanum nigrum var. pilcomayense can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
